verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate Dominum, quoniam bonus est psalmus ;  Deo nostro sit jucunda, decoraque laudatio.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֥לְלוּ־יָ֨הּ ׀ כִּי־ט֭וֹב זַמְּרָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ כִּי־נָ֝עִ֗ים נָאוָ֥ה תְהִלָּֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Alleluia. Praise ye the Lord, because psalm is good: to our God be joyful and comely praise.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kiittäkäät Herraa! sillä Jumalaamme kiittää on kallis asia: kiitos on suloinen ja kaunis.
verses.king_james: Praise ye the Lord: for it is good to sing praises unto our God; for it is pleasant; and praise is comely.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificans Jerusalem Dominus,  dispersiones Israëlis congregabit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בּוֹנֵ֣ה יְרוּשָׁלַ֣͏ִם יְהֹוָ֑ה נִדְחֵ֖י יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל יְכַנֵּֽס׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord buildeth up Jerusalem: he will gather together the dispersed of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra rakentaa Jerusalemin, ja kokoo hajoitetut Israelilaiset.
verses.king_james: The Lord doth build up Jerusalem: he gathereth together the outcasts of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui sanat contritos corde,  et alligat contritiones eorum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָ֭רֹפֵא לִשְׁב֣וּרֵי לֵ֑ב וּ֝מְחַבֵּ֗שׁ לְעַצְּבוֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who healeth the broken of heart, and bindeth up their bruises.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän parantaa murretut sydämet, ja sitoo heidän kipunsa.
verses.king_james: He healeth the broken in heart, and bindeth up their wounds.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui numerat multitudinem stellarum,  et omnibus eis nomina vocat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מוֹנֶ֣ה מִ֭סְפָּר לַכּוֹכָבִ֑ים לְ֝כֻלָּ֗ם שֵׁמ֥וֹת יִקְרָֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who telleth the number of the stars: and calleth them all by their names.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lukee tähdet, ja kutsuu heitä kaikkia nimeltänsä.
verses.king_james: He telleth the number of the stars; he calleth them all by their names.

verses.latin_vulgate: Magnus Dominus noster, et magna virtus ejus,  et sapientiæ ejus non est numerus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גָּד֣וֹל אֲדוֹנֵ֣ינוּ וְרַב־כֹּ֑חַ לִ֝תְבוּנָת֗וֹ אֵ֣ין מִסְפָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Great is our Lord, and great is his power: and of his wisdom there is no number.
verses.finnish_biblia: Suuri on meidän Herramme, ja suuri hänen voimansa, ja hänen viisautensa on määrätöin.
verses.king_james: Great is our Lord, and of great power: his understanding is infinite.

verses.latin_vulgate: Suscipiens mansuetos Dominus ;  humilians autem peccatores usque ad terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מְעוֹדֵ֣ד עֲנָוִ֣ים יְהֹוָ֑ה מַשְׁפִּ֖יל רְשָׁעִ֣ים עֲדֵי־אָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord lifteth up the meek, and bringeth the wicked down even to the ground.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra ojentaa raadolliset, ja jumalattomat maahan paiskaa.
verses.king_james: The Lord lifteth up the meek: he casteth the wicked down to the ground.

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcinite Domino in confessione ;  psallite Deo nostro in cithara.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֱנ֣וּ לַֽיהֹוָ֣ה בְּתוֹדָ֑ה זַמְּר֖וּ לֵאלֹהֵ֣ינוּ בְכִנּֽוֹר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Sing ye to the Lord with praise: sing to our God upon the harp.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vuoroin veisatkaat Herralle kiitossanalla, ja veisatkaat meidän Herrallemme kanteleella;
verses.king_james: Sing unto the Lord with thanksgiving; sing praise upon the harp unto our God:

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui operit cælum nubibus,  et parat terræ pluviam ;  qui producit in montibus fœnum,  et herbam servituti hominum ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַֽמְכַסֶּ֬ה שָׁמַ֨יִם ׀ בְּעָבִ֗ים הַמֵּכִ֣ין לָאָ֣רֶץ מָטָ֑ר הַמַּצְמִ֖יחַ הָרִ֣ים חָצִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, and prepareth rain for the earth. Who maketh grass to grow on the mountains, and herbs for the service of men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka taivaan pilvillä peittää ja antaa sateen maan päälle; joka ruohot vuorilla kasvattaa;
verses.king_james: Who covereth the heaven with clouds, who prepareth rain for the earth, who maketh grass to grow upon the mountains.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui dat jumentis escam ipsorum,  et pullis corvorum invocantibus eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נוֹתֵ֣ן לִבְהֵמָ֣ה לַחְמָ֑הּ לִבְנֵ֥י עֹ֝רֵ֗ב אֲשֶׁ֣ר יִקְרָֽאוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who giveth to beasts their food: and to the young ravens that call upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka eläimille antaa heidän ruokansa, ja kaarneen pojille, jotka häntä avuksensa huutavat.
verses.king_james: He giveth to the beast his food, and to the young ravens which cry.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non in fortitudine equi voluntatem habebit,  nec in tibiis viri beneplacitum erit ei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֤א בִגְבוּרַ֣ת הַסּ֣וּס יֶחְפָּ֑ץ לֹא־בְשׁוֹקֵ֖י הָאִ֣ישׁ יִרְצֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall not delight in the strength of the horse: nor take pleasure in the legs of a man.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hän mielisty hevosten väkevyyteen, eikä hänelle kelpaa miehen sääriluut.
verses.king_james: He delighteth not in the strength of the horse: he taketh not pleasure in the legs of a man.

verses.latin_vulgate: Beneplacitum est Domino super timentes eum,  et in eis qui sperant super misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רוֹצֶ֣ה יְ֭הֹוָה אֶת־יְרֵאָ֑יו אֶת־הַֽמְיַחֲלִ֥ים לְחַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord taketh pleasure in them that fear him: and in them that hope in his mercy.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herralle kelpaavat ne, jotka häntä pelkäävät, ja jotka hänen laupiuteensa uskaltavat.
verses.king_james: The Lord taketh pleasure in them that fear him, in those that hope in his mercy.

verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Lauda, Jerusalem, Dominum ;  lauda Deum tuum, Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁבְּחִ֣י יְ֭רוּשָׁלַ͏ִם אֶת־יְהֹוָ֑ה הַֽלְלִ֖י אֱלֹהַ֣יִךְ צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Praise the Lord, O Jerusalem: praise thy God, O Sion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ylistä, Jerusalem, Herraa: kiitä, Zion, sinun Jumalaas!
verses.king_james: Praise the Lord, O Jerusalem; praise thy God, O Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam confortavit seras portarum tuarum ;  benedixit filiis tuis in te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־חִ֭זַּק בְּרִיחֵ֣י שְׁעָרָ֑יִךְ בֵּרַ֖ךְ בָּנַ֣יִךְ בְּקִרְבֵּֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Because he hath strengthened the bolts of thy gates, he hath blessed thy children within thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä hän vahvistaa sinun porttis salvat, ja siunaa sinussa sinun lapses.
verses.king_james: For he hath strengthened the bars of thy gates; he hath blessed thy children within thee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui posuit fines tuos pacem,  et adipe frumenti satiat te.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשָּׂם־גְּבוּלֵ֥ךְ שָׁל֑וֹם חֵ֥לֶב חִ֝טִּ֗ים יַשְׂבִּיעֵֽךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who hath placed peace in thy borders: and filleth thee with the fat of corn.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän saattaa rauhan sinun ääriis, ja ravitsee sinua parhailla nisuilla.
verses.king_james: He maketh peace in thy borders, and filleth thee with the finest of the wheat.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui emittit eloquium suum terræ :  velociter currit sermo ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשֹּׁלֵ֣חַ אִמְרָת֣וֹ אָ֑רֶץ עַד־מְ֝הֵרָ֗ה יָר֥וּץ דְּבָרֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who sendeth forth his speech to the earth: his word runneth swiftly.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähettää puheensa maan päälle: hänen sanansa nopiasti juoksee.
verses.king_james: He sendeth forth his commandment upon earth: his word runneth very swiftly.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dat nivem sicut lanam ;  nebulam sicut cinerem spargit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַנֹּתֵ֣ן שֶׁ֣לֶג כַּצָּ֑מֶר כְּ֝פ֗וֹר כָּאֵ֥פֶר יְפַזֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who giveth snow like wool: scattereth mists like ashes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän antaa lumen niinkuin villan; hän hajoittaa härmän niinkuin tuhan.
verses.king_james: He giveth snow like wool: he scattereth the hoarfrost like ashes.

verses.latin_vulgate: Mittit crystallum suam sicut buccellas :  ante faciem frigoris ejus quis sustinebit ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַשְׁלִ֣יךְ קַֽרְח֣וֹ כְפִתִּ֑ים לִפְנֵ֥י קָ֝רָת֗וֹ מִ֣י יַעֲמֹֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: He sendeth his crystal like morsels: who shall stand before the face of his cold?
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän heittää rakeensa niinkuin palat; kuka hänen pakkasensa edessä kestää?
verses.king_james: He casteth forth his ice like morsels: who can stand before his cold?

verses.latin_vulgate: Emittet verbum suum, et liquefaciet ea ;  flabit spiritus ejus, et fluent aquæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׁלַ֣ח דְּבָר֣וֹ וְיַמְסֵ֑ם יַשֵּׁ֥ב ר֝וּח֗וֹ יִזְּלוּ־מָֽיִם׃
verses.douay_rheims: He shall send out his word, and shall melt them: his wind shall blow, and the waters shall run.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän lähettää sanansa, ja sulaa ne; hän antaa tuulen puhaltaa, niin vedet juoksevat.
verses.king_james: He sendeth out his word, and melteth them: he causeth his wind to blow, and the waters flow.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui annuntiat verbum suum Jacob,  justitias et judicia sua Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַגִּ֣יד דְּבָרָ֣ו לְיַעֲקֹ֑ב חֻקָּ֥יו וּ֝מִשְׁפָּטָ֗יו לְיִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who declareth his word to Jacob: his justices and his judgments to Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän ilmoittaa Jakobille sanansa, ja Israelille säätynsä ja oikeutensa.
verses.king_james: He sheweth his word unto Jacob, his statutes and his judgments unto Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non fecit taliter omni nationi,  et judicia sua non manifestavit eis.  Alleluja.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹ֘א־עָ֤שָׂה כֵ֨ן ׀ לְכׇל־גּ֗וֹי וּמִשְׁפָּטִ֥ים בַּל־יְדָע֗וּם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: He hath not done in like manner to every nation: and his judgments he hath not made manifest to them. Alleluia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hän niin tehnyt kaikille pakanoille; eikä he tiedä hänen oikeuttansa, Halleluja!
verses.king_james: He hath not dealt so with any nation: and as for his judgments, they have not known them. Praise ye the Lord.
